Lightning Broadband

Lightning Broadband offers fixed wireless and broadband in selected Australian areas. We help Australian businesses compare providers and plans—whether you're in Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Adelaide, Canberra, Hobart or elsewhere.

Typical strengths

  • Fixed wireless.
  • High-speed option.
  • Local coverage.

Australian businesses use Telco Review when they want an unbiased view of the market. We compare providers and plans—NBN, mobile, business phone, 1300 numbers—so you get options, not a sales pitch. Whether you're in a capital city or a regional centre, we can help you see what's available and what might work for your situation.

We don't sell Lightning Broadband or any other carrier; we help you compare. For current products and pricing, speak with Lightning Broadband directly. To discuss a review or compare options, reach out.
